ew_context: Major corrective structure completing with head at 98.27 representing wave B peak before impulsive decline
pattern_desc: Classic head and shoulders formation with left shoulder at 88.05, head at 98.27, right shoulder at 87.79. Neckline breakdown at 82.57 confirms bearish reversal.
key_levels: Neckline: 82.57 (critical support broken). Head: 98.27 (major resistance). Target: 66.88 (measured move)
invalidation: Close above 92.79 on D1 timeframe would negate the bearish pattern structure
market_context: Crypto sector weakness amid regulatory uncertainty supports technical breakdown from major reversal pattern
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

SOLUSD has completed a textbook head and shoulders reversal pattern with the head peaking at 98.27 and neckline breakdown confirming at 82.57. The pattern spans significant price action with swing lows forming the base at 81.41 and 81.63, establishing strong structural significance. Current price at 85.86 represents an ideal entry following the neckline violation.

RSI at 25.7% indicates severely oversold conditions supporting continued downside momentum, while EMA20 at 87.03 below EMA50 at 87.33 confirms bearish trend alignment. ATR of 3.34 provides sufficient volatility for the measured target at 66.88.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 92.79 (stop loss level, invalidation zone above right shoulder)
- **Support**: 82.57 (broken neckline now resistance), 66.88 (measured target)

## Invalidation Level

Close above 92.79 on D1 timeframe would negate the head and shoulders pattern by breaching the right shoulder structure and signaling potential false breakdown.

## Macro & Flow Context

Broader crypto weakness amid regulatory pressures and risk-off sentiment supports the technical breakdown. CFD flow data shows turbulent/impulsive characteristics with momentum alignment confirming the bearish bias.
